zh.lifeSummary: 當Jutta of Saxony於大約1223年出生時，她的父親Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen49歲，母親Agnes von Österreich18歲。她於1239年與KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark在丹麥結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年2月2日之前。

zh-hans.København, Kobenhavn, Denmark: 丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jutta of Saxony于大约1223年出生时，她的父亲Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen49岁，母亲Agnes von Österreich18岁。她于1239年与KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark在丹麦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年2月2日之前。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Saxony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Estonian Suurhans ‘big Hans’ (see Hans ).

variants.name: Saxton
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Saxton (Yorkshire), but perhaps occasionally from the lost Saxton preserved in Saxon Street in Woodditton (Cambridgeshire). The Yorkshire placename probably derives from the Old Norse personal name Saxi (see Sax 3) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the first element may alternatively be Old English Seaxe ‘the Saxons’ (in the stem-form Seax-) or perhaps Old English seax ‘stone, rock’. The Cambridgeshire placename probably derives from Old English Seaxe (in the stem-form Seax-) + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Jutta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Judith  , also used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Jutta of Saxony was born about 1223, her father, Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen, was 49 and her mother, Agnes von Österreich, was 18. She married KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark in 1239, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 2 February 1267.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jutta of Saxony est née environ 1223, son père, Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Österreich, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark en 1239, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 2 février 1267.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jutta of Saxony um 1223 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen 49 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Österreich 18. Sie hat 1239 in Dänemark KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 2. Februar 1267.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta of Saxony è nata il circa 1223, sua padre, Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Österreich, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark nel 1239, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 2 febbraio 1267.

ja.Roskilde Domkirche, Roskilde, Kobenhaven: デンマークロスキルドロスキルド

ja.København, Kobenhavn, Denmark: デンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴン
ja.lifeSummary: Jutta of Saxonyが約1223年に生まれた時，父Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsenは49歳，母Agnes von Österreichは18歳であった。1239年にデンマークでKING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年2月2日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jutta of Saxony(이)가 대략 1223년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Österreich(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1239년 덴마크에서 KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 2월 2일 이전 사망했다.

mn.about 1223–before 2 February 1267: ойролцоогоор 1223 он–1267 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 2–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jutta of Saxony nasceu aproximadamente 1223, seu pai, Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Österreich, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark em 1239, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 2 de fevereiro de 1267.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jutta of Saxony родилась около 1223 г., её отцу по имени Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Österreich, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark в 1239 г. в местности Дания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 2 февраль 1267 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jutta of Saxony nació aproximadamente 1223, su papá, Albrecht I. Herzog von Sachsen, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Agnes von Österreich, tenía 18 años. Se casó con KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark en 1239, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 2 de febrero de 1267.
